## What does this PR do?

## Checklist

- [ ] `just ci` passes locally (fmt, clippy, audit, tests)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — the DCO check requires it
- [ ] New behavior has tests
- [ ] User-facing changes update the help view, README, and docs site as applicable
